name: Generate energy-optimized time-blocked workday schedule
prompt: Read input.json which contains a date, wake/end times, fixed commitments, and a list of 8 tasks with priorities and time estimates. Produce daily_plan.json with: (1) date: the date string, (2) primary_goal: a one-sentence description of the day's main focus, (3) top_3_priorities: array of the 3 task names that have priority=1, (4) time_blocks: array of objects each with start_time (HH:MM), end_time (HH:MM), name (block label), and tasks (array of task name strings scheduled in that block) — include the fixed commitments as their own blocks and schedule all 8 tasks into non-overlapping blocks, (5) total_scheduled_minutes: total minutes of task work (excluding fixed commitments), (6) buffer_percentage: percentage of the available work time left as buffer (must be at least 15%).

criteria.description: Time blocks are valid and non-overlapping

origin.notes: auto-converted from legacy skill-bench TaskDefinition by tools/convert-from-skill-bench.ts
